_readme: Starter data file for the estate sale site. Each object in 'items' is one listing. Add a new item by copying an existing block and changing the values. 'photos' is a list of filenames — drop the actual image files in an /images folder and reference them here. Delete this _readme key before going live if you want, it's ignored by the site.

items.title: Oak Farmhouse Quilt Chest
items.shortDescription: Solid oak blanket chest with dovetail joints and original iron hardware.
items.description: Antique dovetailed oak chest, likely early 1900s. Original iron strap hinges and lock (no key). Some surface wear consistent with age, no structural damage. Great as a coffee table or entry bench.
items.notes: Minor scuffing on lid, one hinge slightly loose but functional.

items.title: Craftsman 10" Table Saw
items.shortDescription: Bench-style table saw, runs great, includes rip fence and miter gauge.
items.description: Craftsman 10-inch table saw, single phase, tested and running. Comes with rip fence, miter gauge, and a spare blade. Well maintained, stored indoors.
items.notes: Cord shows some wear near the plug — recommend inspecting before heavy use.

items.title: Cast Iron Wagon Wheel (Pair)
items.shortDescription: Matched pair of steel-banded wagon wheels, great as yard or barn decor.
items.description: Set of two matching wooden wagon wheels with steel bands, salvaged from an old farm implement. Structurally solid, some weathering and paint loss. Popular as garden or porch decor.

items.title: Vintage Milk Glass Lot
items.shortDescription: Box lot of ~12 pieces of milk glass — vases, bowls, and candy dishes.
items.description: Mixed lot of milk glass, roughly a dozen pieces including vases, bowls, and a hobnail candy dish. No major chips found, some pieces unmarked.
items.notes: Sold as one lot, not individually.

items.title: PTO-Driven Wood Chipper
items.shortDescription: Tractor PTO wood chipper, mechanically sound, minor rust on frame.
items.description: PTO-driven wood chipper for tractor hookup. Blades sharp, feed chute intact, was running before storage. Frame shows surface rust but no structural rot.
items.notes: Has not been started in approximately 2 years — recommend service before use.
items.condition: As-is, mechanically sound at last use

items.title: Antique Mantel Clock
items.shortDescription: Wind-up mantel clock with chime, in a wood case.
items.description: Vintage 8-day wind-up mantel clock with brass accents and a Westminster chime. Wood case shows some finish wear but the movement runs and keeps reasonable time.
items.notes: Key included; needs occasional winding, not battery operated.

items.title: Cast Iron Wall Key Rack
items.shortDescription: Wall-mount cast iron key/hook rack with decorative scrollwork.
items.description: Small cast iron wall rack with five hooks and scroll detailing, useful for keys or small tools by the door. Original black finish with light surface rust.

items.title: Kenmore Wringer Washer
items.shortDescription: Vintage Kenmore wringer-style washing machine, for display or restoration.
items.description: Older Kenmore wringer washer, likely mid-20th century. Motor turns freely but has not been tested under load — being sold as a display/restoration piece rather than a working appliance.
items.notes: Sold as-is; not tested for operation.

items.title: Corning Ware Casserole Set
items.shortDescription: Set of 4 Corning Ware casserole dishes with lids, classic blue cornflower pattern.
items.description: Four-piece Corning Ware casserole set in the classic blue cornflower design, various sizes with matching glass lids. No chips or cracks found.
items.notes: One lid has a small hairline scratch, does not affect use.

items.title: Wicker Patio Chair Set
items.shortDescription: Pair of wicker patio chairs with cushions.
items.description: Two matching wicker-style patio chairs with weather-resistant cushions, used on a covered porch. Frames are sturdy, some wicker wear on the arms.
items.notes: Cushions can be washed; minor fading from sun exposure.
items.dimensions: 28" W x 30" D x 34" H each
items.condition: Good, some wear on wicker arms

items.title: 10-Gallon Glass Aquarium Setup
items.shortDescription: 10-gallon glass aquarium with hood, light, and filter.
items.description: Standard 10-gallon glass aquarium tank including hood, light fixture, and a hang-on-back filter. No leaks noted when last filled; sold empty and clean.
items.notes: Filter cartridge not included; heater not included.

items.title: Singer Sewing Machine in Cabinet
items.shortDescription: Singer sewing machine built into its original wood cabinet.
items.description: Vintage Singer sewing machine mounted in its matching wood cabinet, which folds closed for storage. Machine turns over by hand; motor and foot pedal included but not tested.
items.notes: Sold as-is; recommend servicing before regular use.
items.dimensions: 34" W x 18" D x 30" H (cabinet closed)

items.title: Boy's Huffy Bicycle
items.shortDescription: Kids' Huffy bicycle, good condition, ready to ride.
items.description: Boy's Huffy bicycle, roughly a youth/teen size, with working brakes and gears. Tires hold air, chain is in good shape.
items.notes: Some scuffs on the frame from normal use.

items.title: Craftsman Rolling Tool Chest
items.shortDescription: Craftsman rolling tool chest with multiple drawers, empty.
items.description: Red Craftsman rolling tool chest/cabinet combo with ball-bearing drawer slides. Drawers are empty — being sold as storage, not with tools included. Casters roll smoothly.
items.notes: One drawer handle is slightly bent but functions fine.

items.title: Corded Belt Sander
items.shortDescription: 3-inch corded belt sander, tested and working.
items.description: Standard 3-inch corded belt sander, plugged in and tested — runs smoothly with no unusual noise. Comes with one sanding belt installed.
items.notes: Cord is in good condition, no exposed wire.

items.title: Vintage Farm Windmill Weight
items.shortDescription: Cast iron farm windmill weight, collectible display piece.
items.description: Cast iron counterweight salvaged from an old farm windmill. Popular as a mantel or shelf display piece for collectors of farm antiques. Original casting marks still visible.
items.notes: Heavy — plan for two people to lift.
items.condition: Good, some surface rust typical of age

items.title: Craftsman Wet/Dry Shop Vacuum
items.shortDescription: Craftsman shop vacuum, tested and running, includes hose and attachments.
items.description: Craftsman wet/dry shop vacuum, tank tested and motor runs strong. Comes with the main hose and two attachment nozzles.
items.notes: Filter is original and could use replacing for best suction.

items.title: 5HP Gas-Powered Log Splitter
items.shortDescription: Gas-powered log splitter, 5HP engine, starts and runs.
items.description: 5HP gas engine log splitter mounted on a wheeled frame for easy positioning. Engine starts within a couple pulls and the hydraulic ram operates smoothly.
items.notes: Hydraulic fluid was topped off recently; recommend checking level before use.
